tasks.label: Flash (J-Link, SAM3X8E, Due1)
args: if ! command -v JLinkExe >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "JLinkExe not found in WSL. Install SEGGER J-Link for Linux and ensure JLinkExe is in PATH."; exit 127; fi; JLinkExe -NoGui 1 -CommandFile "${workspaceFolder}/tools/jlink_flash_sam3x8e.jlink"
